commitResults.messageTitle: Refactor: Enforce Command-Model validation boundaries and expand test partitions
commitResults.messageBody:
- Removed redundant try-catch(IndexOutOfBoundsException) wrappers from the Model layer (SKUTask, SKUTaskList), adopting ssert blocks to safely enforce internal logic and data invariants.
- Offloaded all user-input validation to the Command layer (ViewCommandHandler), explicitly throwing InvalidIndexException on bound violations (e.g., index <= 0) to cleanly catch recoverable errors.
- Downgraded WARNING level logging in missing-item data flows to INFO level to distinguish regular program operations from critical bugs.
- Implemented comprehensive equivalence partitioning boundary tests in FindCommandTest, SKUTaskListTest, and SKUTaskTest covering edge cases like size + 1 indexing, null attributes, partial string matching, and empty lists.
added more relevant assertions + test cases for more coverage & edge cases (used equivalence partitioning). improved logging and exception handling; removing redundancies
